Title: AgentRun for Umbraco
Description: AI-powered workflow engine for Umbraco. Define multi-step agent workflows in YAML and run them from the backoffice. Ten shipped tools cover HTTP fetch, file I/O, Umbraco content (list, get, search via Examine), Umbraco.AI Contexts, and web search (Brave / Tavily) — plus a simple .NET interface for plugging in your own custom tools. Three ready-to-run examples: an Umbraco Content Audit that scores six-or-seven pillars against real prose extracted from Block List / Block Grid / Rich Text body copy (the optional seventh Brand pillar lights up when you attach an Umbraco.AI Context), a Content Quality Audit for any public URL, and an Accessibility Quick-Scan for WCAG 2.1 AA findings. Prompt caching, prompt-variable injection, per-step model profiles, and an Agent Sanctum pattern for identity-heavy agents are all built in. Apache 2.0 licensed, built on Umbraco.AI.

AuthorDetails.Name: Adam Shallcross
AuthorDetails.Description: CEO & Founder at Cogworks. Umbraco advocate, interested in how humans and AI can work together in harmony.
